name: useCssVar
description: Hook that returns the value of a css variable
examples: const { ref, value, set, remove } = useCssVar('--color', 'red');

parameters.name: initialValue
parameters.description: The initial value of the CSS variable

source.source: * @param {string} initialValue The initial value of the CSS variable

tokens.name: initialValue
tokens.description: The initial value of the CSS variable

returns.name: The
returns.description: object containing the value of the CSS variable and ref

source.source: * @returns {UseCssVarReturn & { ref: StateRef<Element> }} The object containing the value of the CSS variable and ref
